headline: Is Travelers (TRV) Pricing Fully Reflect Long Term Value After 3 Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Travelers Companies' current share price fairly reflects the business, you are in the right place for a clear look at what you are paying for. The stock last closed at US$306.31, with a 1 year return of 20.8% and a 3 year return of 83.6%. The most recent 7 day return was a 0.8% decline, the 30 day return was 1.6%, and the year to date return sits at 7.4%. These price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in large US insurers. Investors are paying close...
